betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Crafting Terminal§f

§aCrafting grid + ME network access.§f

The §bME Crafting Terminal§f combines a standard Terminal with a §e3×3 crafting grid§f. Craft items directly from network storage.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e1§f
§b•§f Crafting grid: §e3×3§f
§b•§f Network access: full read/write

§6How to Use§f:
§b1.§f Place recipes in the crafting grid
§b2.§f The output pulls ingredients from the ME network
§b3.§f The crafting result goes back into network storage
§b4.§f Click the output to take it into your inventory

§6Crafting Recipe§f:
§b•§f §b1× ME Terminal§f
§b•§f §b1× Crafting Table§f
§b•§f §b1× Calculation Processor§f

§6Strategic Role§f:
The ME Crafting Terminal is your §9primary workbench replacement§f in an ME network. It removes the need to manage inventory space during crafting.

§6Why It Matters§f:
Required for §bpattern encoding§f in §bME Pattern Terminals§f. Without a Crafting Terminal, you cannot set up automated processing patterns.

§eTip§f: Place §bME Crafting Terminals§f in §9multiple locations§f (base, mining outpost, farm) so crafting is always in reach.
